summary: Crystal‑clear tape captures a mesmerizing Space and a blazing Just Want To Make Love To You, making this one of the best recordings of the era.
review: The recording is praised for its vivid clarity, especially on the extended Space segment, and it faithfully renders the high‑energy “Just Want To Make Love To You” jam and the elusive Caution jam. Reviewers highlight a standout second set, strong audience interaction, and Jerry’s distinctive guitar work, making the show both musically and technically compelling.

ai_rating.rationale: All five reviews are 4–5 stars and emphasize excellent musical performance (especially Space and the second‑set jams) together with a very clear recording, yielding a high combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers repeatedly note crystal‑clear capture of Space, strong pre‑drums and drums/space balance, and overall superb tape fidelity; no major flaws reported.

standout_songs: Just Want To Make Love To You
show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set is highlighted as the high point, with seamless transitions into the Caution jam and enthusiastic audience response (clapping, chanting NFA). Overall pacing is described as engaging and memorable.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Jerry’s playing is described as ‘sawing off the corners’ of the Centrum, delivering a vivid, cutting tone throughout the show.
